name: Cranberry Cheesecake with Walnut Crust
recipeIngredient: 3 packages (8 oz. each) cream cheese, softened
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. In a small bowl combine the graham cracker crumbs, chopped walnuts, and melted butter.
3. Press the mixture firmly into the bottom of a 9-inch spring-form pan.
4. Bake for 5 to 6 minutes or until golden; remove from oven and cool slightly.
5. Spread with cranberry sauce and set aside.
6. Reduce oven temperature to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
7. In a large bowl, beat the cream cheese, sugar, and flour until smooth.
8. Beat in the eggs, sour cream, and vanilla extract until well blended.
9. Spread evenly over the cranberry sauce.
10. Bake for about 1 hour or until a knife inserted 1-1/2 inches from the edge comes out clean.
11. Turn off oven; leave cheesecake in oven with door ajar until top is firm to the touch, about 30 minutes.
12. Cool on a wire rack for about an hour.
13. Cover and refrigerate until cold, about 4 hours.
14. Just before serving, remove cheesecake from pan to a serving plate.
15. Garnish with sugared cranberries, kiwi slices, and mint leaves if desired.
NOTE: To make sugared cranberries, place fresh cranberries in a bowl of granulated sugar and turn to coat; set aside.
